## What
<!-- One sentence describing the change. -->

## Why
<!-- The problem this solves. Link the issue if there is one. -->

## How tested
- [ ] `python3 scripts/lint.py` passes
- [ ] Skill manually invoked in Claude Code and behaves as expected (if skill change)
- [ ] Docs updated (if behavior change)

## Checklist
- [ ] Skill frontmatter has `name` and `description`
- [ ] Description clearly states when the skill should auto-invoke
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or PII in the diff
